queries.question: For each firm, give me the corresponding project description.
queries.sql: select design_build_firms.name , project_types.description from Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types join Project_Types on Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.TypeID = Project_Types.TypeID join Design_Build_Firms on Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.FirmID = Design_Build_Firms.FirmID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?design_build_firms_project_types a :Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types .
  ?project_types a :Project_Types .
  ?design_build_firms_project_types p:hasProject_Types ?project_types .
  ?design_build_firms a :Design_Build_Firms .
  ?design_build_firms_project_types p:hasDesign_Build_Firms ?design_build_firms .
  ?design_build_firms p:name ?name .
  ?project_types p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: What project description is in common for all firms?
queries.sql: SELECT Project_Types.Description  from Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types join Project_Types on Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.TypeID = Project_Types.TypeID join Design_Build_Firms on Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.FirmID = Design_Build_Firms.FirmID   GROUP BY Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.TypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Design_Build_Firms_Project_Types.FirmID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Design_Build_Firms)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the project descriptions corresponding to each firm.
